scripts.demo:line:client: node demos/line-agent.js client "我想約下週跟律師討論 AI 供應商合約"
scripts.demo:line:secretary: node demos/line-agent.js secretary "今天有哪些待確認預約？"
scripts.demo:line:guest: node demos/line-agent.js guest "你們有提供法律諮詢嗎？"
scripts.demo:all: npm run demo:radar && npm run demo:line:client && npm run demo:line:secretary && npm run demo:line:guest && npm run demo:hours && npm run demo:billing && npm run demo:duck
